title: Semi Eva related ADV on the Xbox Live Video Marketplace
display_title: Semi Eva related ADV on the Xbox Live Video Marketplace
wikitext:
[]: Semi-Eva related: ADV on the Xbox Live Video Marketplace             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:10 pm Press release here: http://www.microsoft.com/presspass/press/2007/mar07/03-27PartnerHighDefPR.mspx No specific titles are mentioned, but I wouldn't be too suprised if you could direct download individual Eva episodes onto your Xbox 360 sometime soon...

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:11 pm Link is broken...

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:12 pm Oh, fork no! That'd be the end of Eva fandom as we know it!

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:15 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: Link is broken...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:35 pm ferrarimanf355 wrote: Coming soon: the Rei Ayanami fanwank limited edition Xbox 360 faceplate!

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Tue Mar 27, 2007 11:36 pm Free HD eva is pretty cool. And I wouldn't mind the faceplate for um uh...personal projects?

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Wed Mar 28, 2007 12:05 am HD Eva? Those black sketch lines can only get so crystal clear, fellas.

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Wed Mar 28, 2007 12:07 am BrikHaus81 wrote: ferrarimanf355 wrote: Coming soon: the Rei Ayanami fanwank limited edition Xbox 360 faceplate!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Mar 28, 2007 12:10 am ferrarimanf355 wrote: BrikHaus81 wrote: ferrarimanf355 wrote: Coming soon: the Rei Ayanami fanwank limited edition Xbox 360 faceplate!

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Mar 28, 2007 1:07 am honestly eva faceplates would count as one of the 40 or so good reasons i'd require to buy an xbox 360

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Wed Mar 28, 2007 9:53 am BrikHaus81 wrote: ferrarimanf355 wrote: BrikHaus81 wrote: ferrarimanf355 wrote: Coming soon: the Rei Ayanami fanwank limited edition Xbox 360 faceplate!
